meta.title: NK Udada Foundation — Empower & Equip
meta.description: NK Udada Foundation is a youth-led nonprofit in Uganda empowering young people through education, menstrual health, life skills, and community. Empower and Equip.

hero.subtitle: NK Udada Foundation is a youth-founded nonprofit in Uganda equipping young people with education, health resources, life skills, and community — because when we invest in both genders, we multiply potential.

highlightCard.title: Mengo Social Centre Medical Camp
highlightCard.body: A landmark day serving over 900 community members — led and coordinated by NK Udada Foundation in partnership with four major organisations.

body: NK Udada Foundation was born from a vision to address the systemic inequalities faced by young girls and women in Uganda — but our founder quickly understood that true gender equality cannot be achieved by empowering only one side.
We believe in nurturing both young women and men to be bold, educated, and compassionate. When we invest in both genders, we are not dividing power — we are multiplying potential.

Today, NK Udada operates across Kampala with a growing team of youth changemakers, a robust volunteer network, and partnerships with established organisations in health, education, and community development.

pillars.title: Education Access
pillars.desc: Removing barriers to learning for youth in under-resourced communities across Uganda.

pillars.title: Menstrual Health & Support
pillars.desc: Providing products, education and a stigma-free space so girls never miss school because of their period.

pillars.title: Life Skills & Mentorship
pillars.desc: Career development, financial literacy, mental health, and peer support for young people.

pillars.title: Advocacy & Awareness
pillars.desc: Challenging harmful norms and amplifying youth voices in communities and policy spaces.

impact.subtitle: Every number here represents a young life touched. Here's what NK Udada has delivered on the ground.

cards.label: Community Members Served
cards.desc: In a single day at the Mengo Social Centre Medical Camp — free healthcare, HIV testing, youth counselling, and medication.

cards.label: Vulnerable Youth Reached
cards.desc: Through the Kawempe Zone Slum Area community outreach — menstrual kits, reproductive health sessions, and life skills support.

cards.label: Services in One Day
cards.desc: Medical consultations, scans, circumcision, HIV screening, family planning, counselling, and free medication — all free of charge.

event.label: Major Organisations — One Mission
event.desc: NK Udada served as the lead implementing organisation, coordinating with healthcare providers, charities, and community partners to deliver extraordinary impact.

programs.subtitle: Our work is holistic and inclusive — designed to serve both young women and men in Uganda's under-resourced communities.

featured.title: School Outreach Programme
featured.desc: Our flagship programme brings interactive sessions directly into schools across Kampala — covering mentorship, sexual and reproductive health, career guidance, and financial literacy. We partner with educators and parents to create lasting change.

cards.title: Menstrual Health Programme
cards.desc: Providing reusable menstrual health kits, education, and safe spaces so girls never miss school because of their period. We break the stigma one community at a time.

cards.title: Community Health Outreach
cards.desc: Partnering with medical organisations to bring free healthcare — consultations, HIV testing, family planning, and medication — to under-served communities in Kampala.

team.subtitle: Six young people. One mission. Building a more equitable Uganda.

joinCard.title: Join the Team
joinCard.desc: We're always looking for passionate youth to volunteer with us.

volunteer.subtitle: NK Udada runs on the energy and skills of passionate young people. Whether you're into health, education, communications, or events — there's a place for you.

perks.text: Work alongside a dedicated leadership team
Build real experience in community development

volunteer.formNote: We'll reach out within 5 business days. Your information is kept confidential.
volunteer.successBody: We've received your interest and will be in touch within 5 business days. Welcome to the NK Udada community.

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.subtitle: Whether you're a potential partner, funder, community member, or just curious about our work — we'd love to hear from you.
contact.donateNote: Every contribution — big or small — directly funds menstrual health kits, educational materials, and community outreach.
